login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Join the MarinMC world
login.validationError: Username must be at least 3 chars, password at least 6 chars.

settings.title: Advanced Settings
settings.clearCacheDesc: Clears all downloaded game files and temporary folders.
settings.resetSettingsDesc: Restores all launcher settings to their default values.
settings.openLogsDesc: Opens the folder containing error logs and launcher log files.
settings.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to logout?
settings.resetConfirm: All settings will be reset to defaults. Are you sure?
settings.javaTestFail: Java test failed. Please check the path:

mods.title: Mod Manager
mods.subtitle: Manage server mods and your custom mods here
mods.serverModsDesc: These mods are required to connect to the MarinMC server. Cannot be removed or disabled.
mods.customModsDesc: Your own additional mods. You can disable them if they conflict with the server.
mods.conflictWarning: Conflict detected with a server mod. This mod may crash the game!
mods.modLocked: This mod is required for MarinMC server
mods.warningBanner: Custom mods may cause server incompatibility. Disable them if you experience issues.
mods.dropzoneText: Drag files here or click to select

updater.bannerText: New version available: {{version}} — Download and Update
